creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Aloha Matthias,

that's quite an unfortunate situation. The default git user is not created by the port www/gitlab - its only used by it. But the port alsi often requires /home/git and it is very hard and error prone to change it. 

So the best solution i currently see is to update the doc to reflect this pitfall. Or do you have any other idea?

Greetings,
Torsten
